revision.text:
'''手力雄神社'''（たぢからおじんじゃ・てぢからおじんじゃ）は、[[アメノタヂカラオ]]（天手力雄・天手力男）を[[祭神]]とする[[神社]]。同名の神社が複数存在する。
*[[手力雄神社 (館山市)|手力雄神社]] [[千葉県]][[館山市]]の神社（たぢからおじんじゃ）。 *[[手力雄神社 (岐阜市)|手力雄神社]] [[岐阜県]][[岐阜市]]の神社（てぢからおじんじゃ）。 *[[手力雄神社 (各務原市)|手力雄神社]] [[岐阜県]][[各務原市]]の神社（てぢからおじんじゃ）。
== 関連項目 == アメノタヂカラオを祀る神社 *[[戸隠神社]]（[[長野県]][[長野市]]） *佐那神社（[[三重県]][[多気郡]]） *白井神社（[[兵庫県]][[尼崎市]]） *[[雄山神社]]（[[富山県]][[上新川郡]][[立山町]]） *[[摂末社]]の戸隠神社、戸隠社
[[Category:神社 (祭神・信仰別)|たちからおしんしや]]

* [[手力雄神社 (館山市)]]（たぢからおじんじゃ） - [[千葉県]][[館山市]]鎮座 * [[手力雄神社 (岐阜市)]]（てぢからおじんじゃ） - [[岐阜県]][[岐阜市]]鎮座 * [[手力雄神社 (各務原市)]]（てぢからおじんじゃ） - 岐阜県[[各務原市]]鎮座 * [[手力雄神社 (大垣市)]]（てぢからおじんじゃ） - 岐阜県[[大垣市]]鎮座 * [[手力雄神社 (奈良市)]]（たぢからおじんじゃ） - [[奈良県]][[奈良市]]鎮座 * [[手力雄神社 (桜井市)]]（たぢからおじんじゃ） - [[奈良県]][[桜井市]]鎮座
== 関連項目 == 天手力雄神を祀る神社 * 長谷山口坐神社（[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]） * [[戸隠神社]]（[[長野県]][[長野市]]） * [[佐那神社]]（[[三重県]][[多気郡]]） * [[白井神社 (尼崎市)]]（[[兵庫県]][[尼崎市]]） * [[雄山神社]]（[[富山県]][[上新川郡]][[立山町]]） * [[摂末社]]の戸隠神社、戸隠社 * [[戸明神社]]（[[福岡県]][[北九州市]]）
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:たちからおしんしや}} [[Category:神社 (祭神・信仰別)]] [[Category:shinto shrines with the same name]][[ja:手力雄神社]][[category:kk]]

'''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社, also read Tejikarao Shrine) refers to shrines dedicated to {{ill|Ama-no-Tajikarao-no-Kami|ja|天手力雄神・天手力男神}}. Multiple shrines share this name.
* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Tateyama City|ja|館山市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Gifu City)|ja|手力雄神社 (岐阜市)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県}}. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki City)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki City|ja|大垣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Sakurai City|ja|桜井市}}, Nara Prefecture.
== Related Items == Shrines enshrining Ama-no-Tajikarao-no-Kami: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社}} (Sakurai City, Nara Prefecture) * {{ill|Togakushi Shrine|ja|戸隠神社}} ({{ill|Nagano City|ja|長野市}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}) * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社}} ({{ill|Taki District|ja|多気郡}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}) * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)}} ({{ill|Amagasaki City|ja|尼崎市}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|ja|兵庫県}}) * {{ill|Oyama Shrine|ja|雄山神社}} ({{ill|Tateyama Town|ja|立山町}}, {{ill|Nakaniikawa District|ja|上新川郡}}, {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}}) * Subsidiary and branch shrines of Togakushi Shrine * {{ill|Tomei Shrine|ja|戸明神社}} ({{ill|Kitakyūshū City|ja|北九州市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}})
{{Disambiguation}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Tajikarao Shrine}} [[Category:Shrines by Deity]] [[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[Category:Original pages]] [[Category:refresh]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:Tajikarao Shrine]] [[Category:dd]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[ja:手力雄神社]]

* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Tateyama City|ja|館山市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine|ja|手力雄神社 (岐阜市)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県}}. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki City)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki City|ja|大垣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Sakurai City|ja|桜井市}}, Nara Prefecture.
== Related Items == Shrines enshrining Ame-no-Tajikarao: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社}} (Sakurai City, Nara Prefecture) * {{ill|Togakushi Shrine|ja|戸隠神社}} ({{ill|Nagano City|ja|長野市}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}) * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社}} ({{ill|Taki District|ja|多気郡}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}) * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)}} ({{ill|Amagasaki City|ja|尼崎市}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|ja|兵庫県}}) * {{ill|Oyama Shrine|ja|雄山神社}} ({{ill|Tateyama Town|ja|立山町}}, {{ill|Nakaniikawa District|ja|上新川郡}}, {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}}) * Subsidiary and branch shrines of Togakushi Shrine * {{ill|Tomei Shrine|ja|戸明神社}} ({{ill|Kitakyūshū City|ja|北九州市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}})

* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Tateyama City|ja|館山市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine|ja|手力雄神社 (岐阜市)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県}}. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki City)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki City|ja|大垣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Sakurai City|ja|桜井市}}, Nara Prefecture.
== Related Items == Shrines enshrining Ame-no-Tajikarao: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社}} (Sakurai City, Nara Prefecture) * {{ill|Togakushi Shrine|ja|戸隠神社}} ({{ill|Nagano City|ja|長野市}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}) * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社}} ({{ill|Taki District|ja|多気郡}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}) * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)}} ({{ill|Amagasaki City|ja|尼崎市}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|ja|兵庫県}}) * {{ill|Oyama Shrine|ja|雄山神社}} ({{ill|Tateyama Town|ja|立山町}}, {{ill|Nakaniikawa District|ja|上新川郡}}, {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}}) * Subsidiary and branch shrines of Togakushi Shrine * {{ill|Tomei Shrine|ja|戸明神社}} ({{ill|Kitakyūshū City|ja|北九州市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}})

* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Tateyama City|ja|館山市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine|ja|手力雄神社 (岐阜市)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県}}. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki City)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki City|ja|大垣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Sakurai City|ja|桜井市}}, Nara Prefecture.
== Related Items == Shrines enshrining Ame-no-Tajikarao: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社}} (Sakurai City, Nara Prefecture) * {{ill|Togakushi Shrine|ja|戸隠神社}} ({{ill|Nagano City|ja|長野市}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}) * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社}} ({{ill|Taki District|ja|多気郡}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}) * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)}} ({{ill|Amagasaki City|ja|尼崎市}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|ja|兵庫県}}) * {{ill|Oyama Shrine|ja|雄山神社}} ({{ill|Tateyama Town|ja|立山町}}, {{ill|Nakaniikawa District|ja|上新川郡}}, {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}}) * Subsidiary and branch shrines of Togakushi Shrine * {{ill|Tomei Shrine|ja|戸明神社}} ({{ill|Kitakyūshū City|ja|北九州市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}})

'''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社, also read Tejikarao Shrine) refers to shrines dedicated to {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄神・天手力男神}}. Multiple shrines share this name.
* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Tateyama City|ja|館山市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine|ja|手力雄神社 (岐阜市)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県}}. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki City)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki City|ja|大垣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Sakurai City|ja|桜井市}}, Nara Prefecture.
== Related Items == Shrines enshrining Ame-no-Tajikarao: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社}} (Sakurai City, Nara Prefecture) * {{ill|Togakushi Shrine|ja|戸隠神社}} ({{ill|Nagano City|ja|長野市}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}) * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社}} ({{ill|Taki District|ja|多気郡}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}) * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)}} ({{ill|Amagasaki City|ja|尼崎市}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|ja|兵庫県}}) * {{ill|Oyama Shrine|ja|雄山神社}} ({{ill|Tateyama Town|ja|立山町}}, {{ill|Nakaniikawa District|ja|上新川郡}}, {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}}) * Subsidiary and branch shrines of Togakushi Shrine * {{ill|Tomei Shrine|ja|戸明神社}} ({{ill|Kitakyūshū City|ja|北九州市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}})

revision.text:
'''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社, also read Tejikarao Shrine) refers to shrines dedicated to {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄神・天手力男神}}. Multiple shrines share this name.
* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Tateyama City|ja|館山市}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|ja|千葉県}}. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine|ja|手力雄神社 (岐阜市)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Gifu City|ja|岐阜市}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|ja|岐阜県}}. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara City|ja|各務原市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki City)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki City|ja|大垣市}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Nara City|ja|奈良市}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|ja|奈良県}}. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Sakurai City|ja|桜井市}}, Nara Prefecture.
== Related Items == Shrines enshrining Ame-no-Tajikarao: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社}} (Sakurai City, Nara Prefecture) * {{ill|Togakushi Shrine|ja|戸隠神社}} ({{ill|Nagano City|ja|長野市}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|ja|長野県}}) * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社}} ({{ill|Taki District|ja|多気郡}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|ja|三重県}}) * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)}} ({{ill|Amagasaki City|ja|尼崎市}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|ja|兵庫県}}) * {{ill|Oyama Shrine|ja|雄山神社}} ({{ill|Tateyama Town|ja|立山町}}, {{ill|Nakaniikawa District|ja|上新川郡}}, {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|ja|富山県}}) * Subsidiary and branch shrines of Togakushi Shrine * {{ill|Tomei Shrine|ja|戸明神社}} ({{ill|Kitakyūshū City|ja|北九州市}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|ja|福岡県}})

revision.text:
'''手力雄神社'''（たぢからおじんじゃ・てぢからおじんじゃ）は、[[天手力雄神|天手力雄神・天手力男神]]を[[祭神]]とする[[神社]]。同名の神社が複数存在する。
* [[手力雄神社 (館山市)]]（たぢからおじんじゃ） - [[千葉県]][[館山市]]鎮座 * [[手力雄神社 (岐阜市)]]（てぢからおじんじゃ） - [[岐阜県]][[岐阜市]]鎮座 * [[手力雄神社 (各務原市)]]（てぢからおじんじゃ） - 岐阜県[[各務原市]]鎮座 * [[手力雄神社 (大垣市)]]（てぢからおじんじゃ） - 岐阜県[[大垣市]]鎮座 * [[手力雄神社 (奈良市)]]（たぢからおじんじゃ） - [[奈良県]][[奈良市]]鎮座 * [[手力雄神社 (桜井市)]]（たぢからおじんじゃ） - [[奈良県]][[桜井市]]鎮座
== 関連項目 == 天手力雄神を祀る神社 * 長谷山口坐神社（[[奈良県]][[桜井市]]） * [[戸隠神社]]（[[長野県]][[長野市]]） * [[佐那神社]]（[[三重県]][[多気郡]]） * [[白井神社 (尼崎市)]]（[[兵庫県]][[尼崎市]]） * [[雄山神社]]（[[富山県]][[上新川郡]][[立山町]]） * [[摂末社]]の戸隠神社、戸隠社 * [[戸明神社]]（[[福岡県]][[北九州市]]）
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:たちからおしんしや}} [[Category:神社 (祭神・信仰別)]] [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.text:
'''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社, also read Tejikarao Shrine) refers to shrines dedicated to {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄神・天手力男神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|qq=}}. Multiple shrines share this name.
* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Tateyama, Chiba|Tateyama City]], [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]. * [[:en:Tejikarao Shrine|Tajikarao Shrine]] (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Gifu|Gifu City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara City]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Ōgaki|Ōgaki City]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Sakurai, Nara|Sakurai City]], Nara Prefecture.
== Related Items == Shrines enshrining Ame-no-Tajikarao: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|qq=}} (Sakurai City, Nara Prefecture) * [[:en:Togakushi Shrine|Togakushi Shrine]] ([[:en:Nagano (city)|Nagano City]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sana Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Taki District, Mie|Taki District]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|qq=}} ([[:en:Amagasaki|Amagasaki City]], [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]) * [[:en:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|Oyama Shrine]] ([[:en:Tateyama, Toyama|Tateyama Town]], [[:en:Kaminiikawa District, Toyama|Nakaniikawa District]], [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]]) * Subsidiary and branch shrines of Togakushi Shrine * {{ill|Togami Shrine|ja|戸明神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomei Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Kitakyushu|Kitakyūshū City]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]])

==Merged second translation== '''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社) is a [[Shinto shrines]] enshrining [[Ama-no-Tajikarao|Ama-no-Tajikarao no Kami]]. Multiple shrines with the same name exist.
* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[Chiba Prefecture]], [[Tateyama City]]. * [[:en:Tejikarao Shrine|Tajikarao Shrine (Gifu City)]] (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[Gifu Prefecture]], [[Gifu City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Gifu Prefecture, [[Kakamigahara City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Gifu Prefecture, [[Ōgaki City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[Nara Prefecture]], [[Nara City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Nara Prefecture, [[Sakurai City]]. == See Also ==
Shrines enshrining Ama-no-Tajikarao no Kami: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchi Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haseyamaguchi Shrine|qq=}} (Located in [[Nara Prefecture]], [[Sakurai City]]). * [[:en:Togakushi Shrine|Togakushi Shrine]] (Located in [[Nagano Prefecture]], [[Nagano City]]). * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sana Shrine|qq=}} (Located in [[Mie Prefecture]], [[Taki District]]). * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki)|qq=}} (Located in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], [[Amagasaki City]]). * [[:en:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)]] (Located in [[Toyama Prefecture]], [[Kamiichi Town]] in [[Nakaniikawa District]]). * [[:en:Setsumatsusha|Subsidiary Shrines]] of Togakushi Shrine and Togakushi Sha. * {{ill|Togami Shrine|ja|戸明神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Togami Shrine|qq=}} (Located in [[Fukuoka Prefecture]], [[Kitakyūshū City]]).

revision.text:
'''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社, also read Tejikarao Shrine) refers to shrines dedicated to {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄神・天手力男神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|qq=}}. Multiple shrines share this name.
* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Tateyama, Chiba|Tateyama City]], [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]. * [[:en:Tejikarao Shrine|Tajikarao Shrine]] (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Gifu|Gifu City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara City]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Ōgaki|Ōgaki City]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Sakurai, Nara|Sakurai City]], Nara Prefecture.
== Related Items == Shrines enshrining Ame-no-Tajikarao: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|qq=}} (Sakurai City, Nara Prefecture) * [[:en:Togakushi Shrine|Togakushi Shrine]] ([[:en:Nagano (city)|Nagano City]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sana Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Taki District, Mie|Taki District]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|qq=}} ([[:en:Amagasaki|Amagasaki City]], [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]) * [[:en:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|Oyama Shrine]] ([[:en:Tateyama, Toyama|Tateyama Town]], [[:en:Kaminiikawa District, Toyama|Nakaniikawa District]], [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]]) * Subsidiary and branch shrines of Togakushi Shrine * {{ill|Togami Shrine|ja|戸明神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomei Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Kitakyushu|Kitakyūshū City]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]])
{{Disambiguation}}

==Merged second translation== '''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社) is a [[Shinto shrines]] enshrining [[Ama-no-Tajikarao|Ama-no-Tajikarao no Kami]]. Multiple shrines with the same name exist.
* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[Chiba Prefecture]], [[Tateyama City]]. * [[:en:Tejikarao Shrine|Tajikarao Shrine (Gifu City)]] (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[Gifu Prefecture]], [[Gifu City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Gifu Prefecture, [[Kakamigahara City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Gifu Prefecture, [[Ōgaki City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[Nara Prefecture]], [[Nara City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Nara Prefecture, [[Sakurai City]]. == See Also ==
Shrines enshrining Ama-no-Tajikarao no Kami: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchi Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haseyamaguchi Shrine|qq=}} (Located in [[Nara Prefecture]], [[Sakurai City]]). * [[:en:Togakushi Shrine|Togakushi Shrine]] (Located in [[Nagano Prefecture]], [[Nagano City]]). * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sana Shrine|qq=}} (Located in [[Mie Prefecture]], [[Taki District]]). * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki)|qq=}} (Located in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], [[Amagasaki City]]). * [[:en:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)]] (Located in [[Toyama Prefecture]], [[Kamiichi Town]] in [[Nakaniikawa District]]). * [[:en:Setsumatsusha|Subsidiary Shrines]] of Togakushi Shrine and Togakushi Sha. * {{ill|Togami Shrine|ja|戸明神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Togami Shrine|qq=}} (Located in [[Fukuoka Prefecture]], [[Kitakyūshū City]]).
{{Disambiguation}}

revision.comment: Bot: remove deleted category Completed disambiguations
revision.text:
'''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社, also read Tejikarao Shrine) refers to shrines dedicated to {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄神・天手力男神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Multiple shrines share this name.
* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Tateyama, Chiba|Tateyama City]], [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]. * [[:en:Tejikarao Shrine|Tajikarao Shrine]] (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Gifu|Gifu City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara City]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Ōgaki|Ōgaki City]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Sakurai, Nara|Sakurai City]], Nara Prefecture.
== Related Items == Shrines enshrining Ame-no-Tajikarao: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Sakurai City, Nara Prefecture) * [[:en:Togakushi Shrine|Togakushi Shrine]] ([[:en:Nagano (city)|Nagano City]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sana Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Taki District, Mie|Taki District]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Amagasaki|Amagasaki City]], [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]) * [[:en:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|Oyama Shrine]] ([[:en:Tateyama, Toyama|Tateyama Town]], [[:en:Kaminiikawa District, Toyama|Nakaniikawa District]], [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]]) * Subsidiary and branch shrines of Togakushi Shrine * {{ill|Togami Shrine|ja|戸明神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomei Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Kitakyushu|Kitakyūshū City]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]])
{{Disambiguation}}

==Merged second translation== '''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社) is a [[Shinto shrines]] enshrining [[Ama-no-Tajikarao|Ama-no-Tajikarao no Kami]]. Multiple shrines with the same name exist.
* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[Chiba Prefecture]], [[Tateyama City]]. * [[:en:Tejikarao Shrine|Tajikarao Shrine (Gifu City)]] (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[Gifu Prefecture]], [[Gifu City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Gifu Prefecture, [[Kakamigahara City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Gifu Prefecture, [[Ōgaki City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[Nara Prefecture]], [[Nara City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Nara Prefecture, [[Sakurai City]]. == See Also ==
Shrines enshrining Ama-no-Tajikarao no Kami: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchi Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haseyamaguchi Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Located in [[Nara Prefecture]], [[Sakurai City]]). * [[:en:Togakushi Shrine|Togakushi Shrine]] (Located in [[Nagano Prefecture]], [[Nagano City]]). * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sana Shrine|qq=}} (Located in [[Mie Prefecture]], [[Taki District]]). * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Located in [[Hyōgo Prefecture]], [[Amagasaki City]]). * [[:en:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)]] (Located in [[Toyama Prefecture]], [[Kamiichi Town]] in [[Nakaniikawa District]]). * [[:en:Setsumatsusha|Subsidiary Shrines]] of Togakushi Shrine and Togakushi Sha. * {{ill|Togami Shrine|ja|戸明神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Togami Shrine|qq=}} (Located in [[Fukuoka Prefecture]], [[Kitakyūshū City]]).

revision.text:
'''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社, also read Tejikarao Shrine) refers to shrines dedicated to {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄神・天手力男神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Multiple shrines share this name.
* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Tateyama, Chiba|Tateyama City]], [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]. * [[:en:Tejikarao Shrine|Tajikarao Shrine]] (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Gifu|Gifu City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara City]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Ōgaki|Ōgaki City]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Sakurai, Nara|Sakurai City]], Nara Prefecture.
== Related Items == Shrines enshrining Ame-no-Tajikarao: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Sakurai City, Nara Prefecture) * [[:en:Togakushi Shrine|Togakushi Shrine]] ([[:en:Nagano (city)|Nagano City]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sana Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Taki District, Mie|Taki District]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Amagasaki|Amagasaki City]], [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]) * [[:en:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|Oyama Shrine]] ([[:en:Tateyama, Toyama|Tateyama Town]], [[:en:Kaminiikawa District, Toyama|Nakaniikawa District]], [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]]) * Subsidiary and branch shrines of Togakushi Shrine * {{ill|Togami Shrine|ja|戸明神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomei Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Kitakyushu|Kitakyūshū City]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]])

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:手力雄神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q11496923]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:43, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社, also read Tejikarao Shrine) refers to shrines dedicated to {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄神・天手力男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Multiple shrines share this name.
* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Tateyama, Chiba|Tateyama City]], [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]. * [[:en:Tejikarao Shrine|Tajikarao Shrine]] (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Gifu|Gifu City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tejikaraō Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikaraō Shrine (Kakamigahara)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara City]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Ōgaki|Ōgaki City]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Sakurai, Nara|Sakurai City]], Nara Prefecture.
== Related Items == Shrines enshrining Ame-no-Tajikarao: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Sakurai City, Nara Prefecture) * [[:en:Togakushi Shrine|Togakushi Shrine]] ([[:en:Nagano (city)|Nagano City]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sana Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Taki District, Mie|Taki District]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Amagasaki|Amagasaki City]], [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]) * [[:en:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|Oyama Shrine]] ([[:en:Tateyama, Toyama|Tateyama Town]], [[:en:Kaminiikawa District, Toyama|Nakaniikawa District]], [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]]) * Subsidiary and branch shrines of Togakushi Shrine * {{ill|Togami Shrine|ja|戸明神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomei Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Kitakyushu|Kitakyūshū City]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]])

Shrines enshrining Ama-no-Tajikarao no Kami: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchi Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haseyamaguchi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Located in [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]], [[Sakurai City]]). * [[:en:Togakushi Shrine|Togakushi Shrine]] (Located in [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagano City|Nagano City]]). * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sana Shrine|qq=}} (Located in [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]], [[Taki District]]). * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Located in [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]], [[Amagasaki City]]). * [[:en:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)]] (Located in [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]], [[Kamiichi Town]] in [[Nakaniikawa District]]). * [[:en:Setsumatsusha|Subsidiary Shrines]] of Togakushi Shrine and Togakushi Sha. * {{ill|Togami Shrine|ja|戸明神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Togami Shrine|qq=}} (Located in [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]], [[Kitakyūshū City]]).

Multiple shrines share this name.
* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Tateyama, Chiba|Tateyama City]], [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]. * [[:en:Tejikarao Shrine|Tajikarao Shrine]] (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Gifu|Gifu City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tejikaraō Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikaraō Shrine (Kakamigahara)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara City]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Ōgaki|Ōgaki City]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Sakurai, Nara|Sakurai City]], Nara Prefecture.
== Related Items == Shrines enshrining Ame-no-Tajikarao: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Sakurai City, Nara Prefecture) * [[:en:Togakushi Shrine|Togakushi Shrine]] ([[:en:Nagano (city)|Nagano City]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sana Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Taki District, Mie|Taki District]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Amagasaki|Amagasaki City]], [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]) * [[:en:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|Oyama Shrine]] ([[:en:Tateyama, Toyama|Tateyama Town]], [[:en:Kaminiikawa District, Toyama|Nakaniikawa District]], [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]]) * Subsidiary and branch shrines of Togakushi Shrine * {{ill|Togami Shrine|ja|戸明神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomei Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Kitakyushu|Kitakyūshū City]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]])

revision.comment: Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:手力雄神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[da:d:Q11496923]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:43, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社, also read Tejikarao Shrine) refers to shrines dedicated to {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄神・天手力男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Multiple shrines share this name.
* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Tateyama, Chiba|Tateyama City]], [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]. * [[:en:Tejikarao Shrine|Tajikarao Shrine]] (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Gifu|Gifu City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tejikaraō Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikaraō Shrine (Kakamigahara)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara City]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Ōgaki|Ōgaki City]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Sakurai, Nara|Sakurai City]], Nara Prefecture.
== Related Items == Shrines enshrining Ame-no-Tajikarao: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Sakurai City, Nara Prefecture) * [[:en:Togakushi Shrine|Togakushi Shrine]] ([[:en:Nagano (city)|Nagano City]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sana Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Taki District, Mie|Taki District]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Amagasaki|Amagasaki City]], [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]) * [[:en:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|Oyama Shrine]] ([[:en:Tateyama, Toyama|Tateyama Town]], [[:en:Kaminiikawa District, Toyama|Nakaniikawa District]], [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]]) * Subsidiary and branch shrines of Togakushi Shrine * {{ill|Togami Shrine|ja|戸明神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomei Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Kitakyushu|Kitakyūshū City]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]])

[[ja:手力雄神社]]
<!--Tajikarao Shrine-->
[[Category:pages with merged translations]] ==Merged second translation== '''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] enshrining [[Ama-no-Tajikarao|Ama-no-Tajikarao no Kami]]. Multiple shrines with the same name exist.
* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama)|1=Tajikarao Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11496924}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]], [[:en:Tateyama City|Tateyama City]]. * [[:en:Tejikarao Shrine|Tajikarao Shrine (Gifu City)]] (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], [[:en:Gifu City|Gifu City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|1=Tejikarao- Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11496922}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Gifu Prefecture, [[Kakamigahara City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|1=Tajikarao Shrine (Ogaki)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134888254}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Gifu Prefecture, [[Ōgaki City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]], [[:en:Nara City|Nara City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Nara Prefecture, [[Sakurai City]]. == See Also ==
Shrines enshrining Ama-no-Tajikarao no Kami: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchi Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haseyamaguchi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Located in [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]], [[Sakurai City]]). * [[:en:Togakushi Shrine|Togakushi Shrine]] (Located in [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagano City|Nagano City]]). * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sana Shrine|qq=}} (Located in [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]], [[Taki District]]). * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Located in [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]], [[Amagasaki City]]). * [[:en:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)]] (Located in [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]], [[Kamiichi Town]] in [[Nakaniikawa District]]). * [[:en:Setsumatsusha|Subsidiary Shrines]] of Togakushi Shrine and Togakushi Sha. * {{ill|Togami Shrine|ja|戸明神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Togami Shrine|qq=}} (Located in [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]], [[Kitakyūshū City]]).

Shrines enshrining Ama-no-Tajikarao no Kami: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchi Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haseyamaguchi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Located in [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]], [[Sakurai City]]). * [[:en:Togakushi Shrine|Togakushi Shrine]] (Located in [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagano City|Nagano City]]). * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sana Shrine|qq=}} (Located in [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]], [[Taki District]]). * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Located in [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]], [[Amagasaki City]]). * [[:en:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)]] (Located in [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]], [[Kamiichi Town]] in [[Nakaniikawa District]]). * [[:en:Setsumatsusha|Subsidiary Shrines]] of Togakushi Shrine and Togakushi Sha. * {{ill|Togami Shrine|ja|戸明神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Togami Shrine|qq=}} (Located in [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]], [[Kitakyūshū City]]).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:手力雄神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:手力雄神社]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:手力雄神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q11496923]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 09:43, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社, also read Tejikarao Shrine) refers to shrines dedicated to {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄神・天手力男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Multiple shrines share this name.
* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Tateyama, Chiba|Tateyama City]], [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]]. * [[:en:Tejikarao Shrine|Tajikarao Shrine]] (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Gifu|Gifu City]], [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tejikaraō Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikaraō Shrine (Kakamigahara)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Kakamigahara|Kakamigahara City]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Ōgaki|Ōgaki City]], Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Nara (city)|Nara City]], [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Sakurai, Nara|Sakurai City]], Nara Prefecture.
== Related Items == Shrines enshrining Ame-no-Tajikarao: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Sakurai City, Nara Prefecture) * [[:en:Togakushi Shrine|Togakushi Shrine]] ([[:en:Nagano (city)|Nagano City]], [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sana Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Taki District, Mie|Taki District]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]]) * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ([[:en:Amagasaki|Amagasaki City]], [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]]) * [[:en:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|Oyama Shrine]] ([[:en:Tateyama, Toyama|Tateyama Town]], [[:en:Kaminiikawa District, Toyama|Nakaniikawa District]], [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]]) * Subsidiary and branch shrines of Togakushi Shrine * {{ill|Togami Shrine|ja|戸明神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomei Shrine|qq=}} ([[:en:Kitakyushu|Kitakyūshū City]], [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]])
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|手力雄神社|version=59914243|comment=Imported full ja history}}
[[ja:手力雄神社]]
<!--Tajikarao Shrine--> ==Merged second translation== '''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社) is a [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]] enshrining [[Ama-no-Tajikarao|Ama-no-Tajikarao no Kami]]. Multiple shrines with the same name exist.
* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama)|1=Tajikarao Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11496924}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Chiba Prefecture|Chiba Prefecture]], [[:en:Tateyama City|Tateyama City]]. * [[:en:Tejikarao Shrine|Tajikarao Shrine (Gifu City)]] (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Gifu Prefecture|Gifu Prefecture]], [[:en:Gifu City|Gifu City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|1=Tejikarao- Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11496922}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Gifu Prefecture, [[Kakamigahara City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|1=Tajikarao Shrine (Ogaki)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134888254}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Gifu Prefecture, [[Ōgaki City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]], [[:en:Nara City|Nara City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Nara Prefecture, [[Sakurai City]]. == See Also ==
Shrines enshrining Ama-no-Tajikarao no Kami: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchi Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haseyamaguchi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Located in [[:en:Nara Prefecture|Nara Prefecture]], [[Sakurai City]]). * [[:en:Togakushi Shrine|Togakushi Shrine]] (Located in [[:en:Nagano Prefecture|Nagano Prefecture]], [[:en:Nagano City|Nagano City]]). * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sana Shrine|qq=}} (Located in [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]], [[Taki District]]). * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Located in [[:en:Hyōgo Prefecture|Hyōgo Prefecture]], [[Amagasaki City]]). * [[:en:Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)]] (Located in [[:en:Toyama Prefecture|Toyama Prefecture]], [[Kamiichi Town]] in [[Nakaniikawa District]]). * [[:en:Setsumatsusha|Subsidiary Shrines]] of Togakushi Shrine and Togakushi Sha. * {{ill|Togami Shrine|ja|戸明神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Togami Shrine|qq=}} (Located in [[:en:Fukuoka Prefecture|Fukuoka Prefecture]], [[Kitakyūshū City]]).

* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama)|1=Tajikarao Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11496924}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|WD=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture}}, [[:en:Tateyama City|Tateyama City]]. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine|en|Tejikarao Shrine|WD=Q3517214|lt=Tajikarao Shrine (Gifu City)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}}, [[:en:Gifu City|Gifu City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|1=Tejikarao- Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11496922}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Gifu Prefecture, [[Kakamigahara City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|1=Tajikarao Shrine (Ogaki)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134888254}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Gifu Prefecture, [[Ōgaki City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture}}, [[:en:Nara City|Nara City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Nara Prefecture, [[Sakurai City]]. == See Also ==
Shrines enshrining Ama-no-Tajikarao no Kami: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchi Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haseyamaguchi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Located in {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture}}, [[Sakurai City]]). * {{ill|Togakushi Shrine|en|Togakushi Shrine|WD=Q218828|lt=Togakushi Shrine}} (Located in {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}, [[:en:Nagano City|Nagano City]]). * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sana Shrine|qq=}} (Located in {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|WD=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture}}, [[Taki District]]). * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Located in {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|WD=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture}}, [[Amagasaki City]]). * {{ill|Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|en|Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|WD=Q11659204|lt=Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)}} (Located in {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|en|Toyama Prefecture|WD=Q132929|lt=Toyama Prefecture}}, [[Kamiichi Town]] in [[Nakaniikawa District]]). * {{ill|Setsumatsusha|en|Setsumatsusha|WD=Q1071160|lt=Subsidiary Shrines}} of Togakushi Shrine and Togakushi Sha. * {{ill|Togami Shrine|ja|戸明神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Togami Shrine|qq=}} (Located in {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture}}, [[Kitakyūshū City]]).

Multiple shrines share this name.
* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Tateyama, Chiba|en|Tateyama, Chiba|WD=Q646755|lt=Tateyama City}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|WD=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine|en|Tejikarao Shrine|WD=Q3517214|lt=Tajikarao Shrine}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Gifu|en|Gifu|WD=Q45798|lt=Gifu City}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Tejikaraō Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikaraō Shrine (Kakamigahara)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara|en|Kakamigahara|WD=Q641491|lt=Kakamigahara City}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en|Ōgaki|WD=Q384926|lt=Ōgaki City}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en|Sakurai, Nara|WD=Q127026|lt=Sakurai City}}, Nara Prefecture.
== Related Items == Shrines enshrining Ame-no-Tajikarao: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Sakurai City, Nara Prefecture) * {{ill|Togakushi Shrine|en|Togakushi Shrine|WD=Q218828|lt=Togakushi Shrine}} ({{ill|Nagano (city)|en|Nagano (city)|WD=Q128849|lt=Nagano City}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}) * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sana Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Taki District, Mie|en|Taki District, Mie|WD=Q1042360|lt=Taki District}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|WD=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture}}) * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Amagasaki|en|Amagasaki|WD=Q213318|lt=Amagasaki City}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|WD=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture}}) * {{ill|Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|en|Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|WD=Q11659204|lt=Oyama Shrine}} ({{ill|Tateyama, Toyama|en|Tateyama, Toyama|WD=Q670189|lt=Tateyama Town}}, {{ill|Kaminiikawa District, Toyama|en|Kaminiikawa District, Toyama|WD=Q11359057|lt=Nakaniikawa District}}, {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|en|Toyama Prefecture|WD=Q132929|lt=Toyama Prefecture}}) * Subsidiary and branch shrines of Togakushi Shrine * {{ill|Togami Shrine|ja|戸明神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomei Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Kitakyushu|en|Kitakyushu|WD=Q188806|lt=Kitakyūshū City}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture}})

'''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社, also read Tejikarao Shrine) refers to shrines dedicated to {{ill|Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja|天手力雄神・天手力男神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Tajikarao|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Multiple shrines share this name.
* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Tateyama, Chiba|en|Tateyama, Chiba|WD=Q646755|lt=Tateyama City}}, {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|WD=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine|en|Tejikarao Shrine|WD=Q3517214|lt=Tajikarao Shrine}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Gifu|en|Gifu|WD=Q45798|lt=Gifu City}}, {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Tejikaraō Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikaraō Shrine (Kakamigahara)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Kakamigahara|en|Kakamigahara|WD=Q641491|lt=Kakamigahara City}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tejikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|qq=}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Ōgaki|en|Ōgaki|WD=Q384926|lt=Ōgaki City}}, Gifu Prefecture. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Nara (city)|en|Nara (city)|WD=Q169134|lt=Nara City}}, {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture}}. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Sakurai, Nara|en|Sakurai, Nara|WD=Q127026|lt=Sakurai City}}, Nara Prefecture.
== Related Items == Shrines enshrining Ame-no-Tajikarao: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haseyamaguchiza Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Sakurai City, Nara Prefecture) * {{ill|Togakushi Shrine|en|Togakushi Shrine|WD=Q218828|lt=Togakushi Shrine}} ({{ill|Nagano (city)|en|Nagano (city)|WD=Q128849|lt=Nagano City}}, {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}) * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sana Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Taki District, Mie|en|Taki District, Mie|WD=Q1042360|lt=Taki District}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|WD=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture}}) * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki City)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} ({{ill|Amagasaki|en|Amagasaki|WD=Q213318|lt=Amagasaki City}}, {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|WD=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture}}) * {{ill|Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|en|Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|WD=Q11659204|lt=Oyama Shrine}} ({{ill|Tateyama, Toyama|en|Tateyama, Toyama|WD=Q670189|lt=Tateyama Town}}, {{ill|Kaminiikawa District, Toyama|en|Kaminiikawa District, Toyama|WD=Q11359057|lt=Nakaniikawa District}}, {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|en|Toyama Prefecture|WD=Q132929|lt=Toyama Prefecture}}) * Subsidiary and branch shrines of Togakushi Shrine * {{ill|Togami Shrine|ja|戸明神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tomei Shrine|qq=}} ({{ill|Kitakyushu|en|Kitakyushu|WD=Q188806|lt=Kitakyūshū City}}, {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture}})

[[ja:手力雄神社]]
<!--Tajikarao Shrine--> ==Merged second translation== '''Tajikarao Shrine''' (手力雄神社) is a {{ill|Shinto shrine|en|Shinto shrine|WD=Q845945|lt=Shinto shrine}} enshrining [[Ama-no-Tajikarao|Ama-no-Tajikarao no Kami]]. Multiple shrines with the same name exist.
* {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama)|ja|手力雄神社 (館山市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Tateyama)|1=Tajikarao Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11496924}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Chiba Prefecture|en|Chiba Prefecture|WD=Q80011|lt=Chiba Prefecture}}, [[:en:Tateyama City|Tateyama City]]. * {{ill|Tejikarao Shrine|en|Tejikarao Shrine|WD=Q3517214|lt=Tajikarao Shrine (Gifu City)}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Gifu Prefecture|en|Gifu Prefecture|WD=Q131277|lt=Gifu Prefecture}}, [[:en:Gifu City|Gifu City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|ja|手力雄神社 (各務原市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Kakamigahara)|1=Tejikarao- Shrine|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11496922}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Gifu Prefecture, [[Kakamigahara City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|ja|手力雄神社 (大垣市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Ōgaki)|1=Tajikarao Shrine (Ogaki)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q134888254}} (てぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Gifu Prefecture, [[Ōgaki City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|ja|手力雄神社 (奈良市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Nara City)|qq=}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture}}, [[:en:Nara City|Nara City]]. * {{ill|Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai)|ja|手力雄神社 (桜井市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tajikarao Shrine (Sakurai)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (たぢからおじんじゃ) - Located in Nara Prefecture, [[Sakurai City]]. == See Also ==
Shrines enshrining Ama-no-Tajikarao no Kami: * {{ill|Haseyamaguchi Shrine|ja|長谷山口坐神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Haseyamaguchi Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Located in {{ill|Nara Prefecture|en|Nara Prefecture|WD=Q131287|lt=Nara Prefecture}}, [[Sakurai City]]). * {{ill|Togakushi Shrine|en|Togakushi Shrine|WD=Q218828|lt=Togakushi Shrine}} (Located in {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|WD=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture}}, [[:en:Nagano City|Nagano City]]). * {{ill|Sana Shrine|ja|佐那神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sana Shrine|qq=}} (Located in {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|WD=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture}}, [[Taki District]]). * {{ill|Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki)|ja|白井神社 (尼崎市)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shirai Shrine (Amagasaki)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Located in {{ill|Hyōgo Prefecture|en|Hyōgo Prefecture|WD=Q130290|lt=Hyōgo Prefecture}}, [[Amagasaki City]]). * {{ill|Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|en|Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)|WD=Q11659204|lt=Oyama Shrine (Tateyama)}} (Located in {{ill|Toyama Prefecture|en|Toyama Prefecture|WD=Q132929|lt=Toyama Prefecture}}, [[Kamiichi Town]] in [[Nakaniikawa District]]). * {{ill|Setsumatsusha|en|Setsumatsusha|WD=Q1071160|lt=Subsidiary Shrines}} of Togakushi Shrine and Togakushi Sha. * {{ill|Togami Shrine|ja|戸明神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Togami Shrine|qq=}} (Located in {{ill|Fukuoka Prefecture|en|Fukuoka Prefecture|WD=Q123258|lt=Fukuoka Prefecture}}, [[Kitakyūshū City]]).
